name: Podcasts
description: Manage podcast subscriptions with automatic RSS feed updates, episode downloads, auto-delete after listening, and daily auto-playlist generation.
overview: Subscribe to podcast RSS feeds, automatically download new episodes, manage auto-deletion of listened content, and generate a daily auto-playlist of unlistened episodes.
changelog:
- Fixed: Scheduled Tasks (IScheduledTask) now properly implement IsHidden and IsEnabled for Jellyfin 10.11
- Fixed: Plugin configuration page button now visible in Jellyfin dashboard
- NEW: Automatic cleanup of deleted-episodes.json at 23:50 daily via Timer
- NEW: Deleted episodes blacklist with 6-month retention
- NEW: 3 configurable scheduled tasks in Jellyfin dashboard
- Users configure task schedules from Dashboard > Scheduled Tasks > Podcasts
- PodcastScheduler handles playback monitoring + daily cleanup timer
